concerns.text: Tasks T070-T073 state 'handled by T017/T019/T022/T024' making them non-executable as implementation tasks. Either remove these duplicate tasks or convert them to verification-only tasks with distinct deliverables.
T076 and T077 are both marked [P] (parallel) but T077 depends on T076's checksum output. This creates a logical execution contradiction that confuses implementers about task ordering.
T069 and T092 are marked [P] but depend on T026 (synthetic dataset generation) completing first. The parallel marking contradicts the stated dependency.
T097 measures Quickstart execution time but does not verify verification by a 'novice user' as required by SC-028. The task description should explicitly include novice-user verification.
T046/T047 do not explicitly implement the abort threshold behavior required when limits are exceeded per FR-009. The task should specify abort logic with ERR-301 when resource limits breach.
T061 computes minimum N for power analysis but does not explicitly ensure the audited corpus meets N≥300 as mandated by FR-025. The verification should assert N≥300 in output.
